/bin/zsh -lc "python - <<'PY'
from app.models import ExistingSelectedPitchContext, NormalizedBriefPreferences
from app.services.character_generation import CharacterGenerationService

service = CharacterGenerationService()
result = service.generate_character_sheets(
    candidate_count=3,
    selected_pitch=ExistingSelectedPitchContext(
        title='The Mapped Lanterns Promise',
        hook='A sleepy apprentice agrees to carry mapped lanterns across a moonlit harbor so the whole night can settle into place.',
        central_conflict='The apprentice must finish the last harbor route before their own worries make the lantern map harder to read.',
        why_it_fits='The pitch stays gentle, visual, and bedtime-safe while still giving the story a clear quest home.',
        bedtime_notes='Every obstacle stays small, named, and emotionally buffered by companions.',
    ),
    raw_brief='A sleepy apprentice follows the last lanterns around a moonlit harbor before bed.',
    genre_label='Quest Fantasy',
    genre_description='A wonder-first bedtime quest with gentle stakes and a clear route home.',
    genre_bedtime_safety_notes='Keep peril soft, temporary, and quickly repaired.',
    tone_label='Hushed Wonder',
    tone_description='Quiet awe, slow pacing, and reassuring emotional clarity.',
    tone_bedtime_notes='Favor soft sensory details and visibly safe endings.',
    normalized_summary='A harbor bedtime quest with mapped lights, teamwork, and a restful return home.',
    story_idea='A sleepy apprentice follows the last lanterns around a moonlit harbor before bed.',
    desired_themes='gentle teamwork and emotional repair',
    key_images='mapped lanterns, quiet docks, silver water',
    audience_notes='bedtime-safe for early elementary listeners',
    must_have_elements='a restful ending and compact support cast',
    normalized_preferences=NormalizedBriefPreferences(word_count='~1400 words', runtime='~11 minutes', chapter_count='3 chapters'),
    guidance='Keep one option sibling-focused and keep the support cast compact.',
)
for criterion in result.evaluation.criteria:
    print(f\"{criterion.name}\\tpassed={criterion.passed}\\tmeasured={criterion.measured_value}\\tdetail={criterion.detail}\")
PY"
